headline: Newmont Outlook Flags Lower 2026 Output And Rising Cost Pressures
summary: Newmont (NYSE:NEM) has issued guidance indicating continued declines in gold production for 2026. The company also expects higher unit costs in 2026 as key mining sites transition and output from several major operations falls. This outlook highlights potential pressure on margins and cash generation relative to its current operating profile. Newmont, trading at $119.01, enters this guidance update after a sharp move in its share price, with the stock up 17.6% year to date and 136.7% over...
